story.title: Our Story
story.text: AZGS was founded with one goal: providing reliable, expert service to residents and businesses in the Amsterdam region.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: For quotes, questions or emergencies. We respond within 1 hour.

email.title: Email

Emergency.title: Emergency Plumber & Electrician Amsterdam | 24/7 AZGS
Emergency.description: Emergency plumber, electrician or heating in Amsterdam? AZGS is available 24/7. On-site within 1 hour.

hero.title: Emergency Service Amsterdam
hero.subtitle: Leak, electrical problem or heating failure? We are available 24/7 and on-site within 1 hour.

faq.title: Emergency FAQ
faq.q1: How quickly can AZGS arrive in an emergency?
faq.a1: We aim to be on-site within 1 hour in Amsterdam.
faq.a2: Yes, our emergency line is available 24/7 including nights and weekends.
faq.q3: What does an emergency call cost?
faq.a3: We work with transparent emergency rates. You always receive a price indication by phone.
faq.q4: For which emergencies can I call AZGS?
faq.a4: Leaks, electrical failures, boiler breakdowns, blockages and more.
faq.q5: Does AZGS work in my area?
faq.a5: We work in Amsterdam and surroundings including Amstelveen, Diemen and Haarlem.

cta.title: Emergency situation?
cta.text: Call us directly. Our emergency line is available day and night.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy | AZGS
Privacy.description: Read the privacy policy of AZGS. We process your personal data in accordance with GDPR.
Privacy.intro: AZGS respects your privacy and processes personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

section1.title: What data do we collect?
section1.text: We only collect data necessary for providing our services, such as name, contact details and project information.

section2.title: How do we use your data?
section2.text: Your data is used solely for carrying out work, quote requests and customer communication. We never sell personal data to third parties.

section3.title: Your rights
section3.text: You have the right to access, correct or delete your data. Please contact us via the email address below.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For questions about our privacy policy, please contact us at:

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions | AZGS
Terms.description: Read the terms and conditions of AZGS for installation and renovation services in Amsterdam.
Terms.intro: These terms and conditions apply to all agreements between AZGS and its clients.

section1.title: Quotes and agreements
section1.text: All AZGS quotes are non-binding and valid for 30 days from the date of issue. An agreement is established upon written confirmation.

section2.title: Execution and warranty
section2.text: AZGS performs work in accordance with applicable Dutch standards. All work carries a 12-month warranty.

section3.title: Payment
section3.text: Payment must be made within 14 days of the invoice date. In case of late payment, AZGS is entitled to charge statutory interest.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For questions about our terms and conditions, please contact us at:
